ŠĒēOŠóįEŠēľOŠóĮ ŠēľE Šó©Ší™ŠóĮŠó©YŠĒē EŠĎéŠó™EŠó™ ŠĎĆŠĎ≠ ŠēľEŠĖáE. ŠóĮŠēľEŠĖáE EŠźĮEŠĖáYTŠēľIŠĎéG EŠĎéŠó™EŠó™.

Casey. The name he gave himself as a kid so that he could avoid his real name. His whole life has just been an endless circle of avoiding everything. Avoiding his parents, his name and his fucked up life. But for some reason there's only one thing he cant avoid. That night,

No matter how far he runs, or what he does he always ends up back where his heart died. With her.

A drug addiction that never went away and thoughts of just saying fuck it and letting everything go.

That small cross that was buried in the dirt mocked him every time he walked by that intersection.

If only he hadn't run.

If only he had told her how much he loved her. If only he had said goodbye.

And today wasnt any different. Except that he had walked a lot further than usual.

And when he couldn't walk any further he collapsed on the stairs of some rich assholes mansion. Only to be interrupted by the owner of the house or the owners son.

Great just what he needed.
